rationale: In the citing paper, Frennea, Han, and Mittal (2019) appears only peripherally, mainly in grouped prior-work references and in a brief justification for including receivables as a control tied to value appropriation. The main theory and hypotheses are built from transaction cost economics/resource-based logic and other core citations, not from this paper's specific mechanism or empirical results. There is no clear borrowing of the cited paper's central model, measures, or findings to drive the focal arguments or tests.
